title: The elements of the marketing mix (the 4Ps)
summary: 9609 AS — product, price, promotion, and place as integrated tools.
learningObjectives: Apply mix to case study firms.

simpleExplanation.title: Four levers, one strategy
simpleExplanation.summary: The marketing mix balances product features, price, promotion, and distribution to meet target customers profitably.

sections.content: **The 4Ps** (3.3.1) frames **3.3.2–3.3.6**. In essays show **how Ps reinforce each other** for the case firm.
